screenshots.caption: Published Northstar site. The output validated Wix Studio's broad platform surface even though task 2 remained fragmented.
screenshots.alt: Published Wix Studio Northstar Pediatrics site
screenshots.notes: Capture the public published site at the top of the page.

screenshots.caption: Aria suggested adding the Wix Pricing Plans app instead of directly applying the governed revision. That kept the score flat rather than improving it.
screenshots.alt: Wix Harmony editor showing Pricing Plans suggestion instead of applying the requested revision
screenshots.notes: Capture the right-side Aria panel with the Pricing Plans recommendation visible.

screenshots.caption: Webflow produced a live public artifact and retained its publish and review strengths, which is why its score stayed unchanged at 56.
screenshots.notes: Capture the public site hero at desktop width.

screenshots.caption: The AI builder dropped into an undefined design path during the plan-limited run. The study treated that as packaging or workspace friction, not a capability downgrade.
screenshots.alt: Webflow AI generation failure showing a 404 undefined design page
screenshots.notes: Capture the failed AI-builder result page.

screenshots.caption: The published site shows that Make moved beyond draft generation and into a real handoff artifact, supporting the +5 empirical lift.
screenshots.alt: Published Figma Make Northstar Pediatrics site
screenshots.notes: Capture the public site at the top of the page.

screenshots.caption: Make preserved versioned publish flow inside the same project. That is what pushed its empirical score above Figma Sites and Framer.
screenshots.alt: Figma Make publish workflow dialog inside the authenticated editor
screenshots.notes: Capture the publish or governed workflow dialog rather than a public page.

screenshots.caption: Lovable delivered one of the fastest prompt-first outputs in the cohort, which validated stronger workflow depth than the desk pass first gave it.
screenshots.alt: Published Lovable Northstar Pediatrics preview site
screenshots.notes: Capture the live preview at desktop width.

screenshots.source: Authenticated Lovable project with credit wall
screenshots.caption: The free-credit wall stopped a governed revision pass. That is why Lovable's stronger real workflow still netted out to a flat score.
screenshots.alt: Lovable daily limit reached dialog inside an authenticated project
screenshots.notes: Capture the Daily limit reached dialog with the upgrade prompt.

screenshots.caption: Blank-site creation routed into a code-component surface rather than a brief-first site builder. That product-path mismatch drove most of the empirical downgrade.
screenshots.alt: Figma Sites authenticated code view showing a main.tsx file instead of a prompt-first site workflow
screenshots.notes: Capture the code-oriented view that surfaced instead of a site-generation flow.

screenshots.caption: Starter-plan publish restriction blocked the final handoff step in both observed runs, reinforcing the workflow-depth downgrade.
screenshots.alt: Figma Sites publish dialog stating that publish is unavailable on the Starter plan
screenshots.notes: Capture the Ready to publish dialog with the Starter-plan restriction visible.

screenshots.source: Authenticated Framer canvas preview after Wireframer rerun
screenshots.caption: Wireframer generated and revised the Northstar page successfully in-editor. Framer still trailed the leaders because the public launch artifact looked less reliable than this canvas result.
screenshots.alt: Framer Wireframer canvas showing the generated Northstar Pediatrics page
screenshots.notes: Capture the desktop canvas result after the follow-on Wireframer rerun, cropped to emphasize the generated page rather than the full editor chrome.

screenshots.caption: Framer's Wireframer flow did work in the follow-on rerun, but it was not surfaced reliably from the initial authenticated project routes. That inconsistency kept Framer below the strongest platforms.
screenshots.alt: Framer editor showing the product workspace used to validate and troubleshoot the AI-first workflow
screenshots.notes: Capture the editor with the project domain and change surfaces visible.
